steps.title: Substitute x = 8
steps.content:
The expression is $x+22$. Since the problem gives $x=8$, replace $x$ with $8$:
$$x+22=8+22$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice B — $22$ is just $22$ without adding $x$. Choice D — $38$ adds $30$ to $x$. The correct substitution gives $30$.
